firmware.notes: Bitstream Studio 0.1.11 — host Wi-Fi/BLE UI gated off; BMI270 hybrid default; stream policy toolbar; live stream budget; HMI brand v0.1.11
Bitstream Studio 0.1.10 — SW_BTN/ADC_POT 20 Hz defaults, SHT40/DPS368 delta 5%, Machine Twin Dev Kit I/O, Telemetry Meta color labels, hybrid sensor boot
Bitstream Studio 0.1.9 — RTC auto-sync, TFT System tab, SW_BTN/ADC_POT board I/O, hybrid sensor boot defaults, DevKit callouts
Bitstream Studio 0.1.8 — Euler/Quat long-soak stable (CM33 fusion mailbox + soft rewind; CM55 stale accel-tilt fallback); Dev Kit default body
Bitstream Studio 0.1.7 — BLE stream stability, CM55/CM33 IPC hardening, crash-watch boot notes
Bitstream Studio 0.1.6 — BMI270 ~25 Hz UART, TFT rate pill fix, auto asset sync + reload
Bitstream Studio 0.1.5 — disable WiFi, MQTT, UDP, BLE
